name: Sticker Album
author: Poki
description: Sticker Album is a puzzle game where you get to decorate your album with loads of adorable stickers! Place each sticker in the perfect spot on the page to complete a lovely picture. Stuck on where a sticker goes? Use the hint button for some help! Can you complete every page and finish your sticker album? How to play Sticker Album? Click and hold to move the sticker, release to drop the stricker on the page. Who created Sticker Album? Sticker Album is created by Dinobros. Play their other games on Poki: goal-training! How can I play Sticker Album for free? You can play Sticker Album for free on Poki. Can I play Sticker Album on mobile devices and desktop? Sticker Album can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
